summary: Tested VAL-CROSS-001: All 15 module packets (12 major + 3 cross-cutting core) have bidirectional links with their corresponding flow packets. All 11 flow packets link back to their owning module packets. ADR cross-references are present where applicable (7 modules link to relevant ADRs). Frontend handoff cross-references are present for modules with frontend surfaces (inventoryâ†’operations, salesâ†’commercial, purchasingâ†’commercial, hrâ†’finance). Cross-cutting modules (core-security-error, core-audit-runtime-settings, core-idempotency, orchestrator) have no dedicated flow packets by design but are properly referenced from flow packets that depend on them. No gaps found. PASS.
